nasb.text: Keep your feet from being unshod And your throat from thirst; But you said, ‘It is hopeless! No! For I have loved strangers, And after them I will walk.’

esv.text: Keep your feet from going unshod and your throat from thirst. But you said, ‘It is hopeless, for I have loved foreigners, and after them I will go.’

cnv.text: 不要使你的腳赤露， 你的喉嚨乾渴！ 你卻說：‘沒用的！ 因為我愛外族人的神， 我要跟從他們！’

ccb.text: 我说，‘不要因追随假神而跑破鞋子，喉咙干渴。’ 你却说，‘不行！ 我爱外族的神明，一定要跟随他们。’
